pilot_tasks.name: Primary pilot: end-to-end pipeline validation

checks.pipeline_validity: absorption_rate in [0.05, 0.50] for >= 3 of 5 letters at 16k
checks.l0_comparison: measure and record L0 for both 16k and 65k; flag l0_confound=true if |L0_16k - L0_65k| / L0_16k > 0.20
checks.lv_sanity: at least 1 of top-10 alpha_ij pairs (by value) is a known letter-feature parent-child pair

pilot_tasks.fail_action: investigate SAELens loading configuration; check Gemma Scope release IDs; do not proceed to C1A

pilot_tasks.name: Activation stats pilot: single SAE config, 1k tokens
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: alpha_ij parquet written with >= 500 pairs AND no NaN/inf in alpha_ij AND at least 10 pairs with alpha_ij > 1.0

pilot_tasks.name: LV detector pilot: 5-letter calibration, 3-letter test
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: F1 > 0.35 on 3-letter test set AND sigmoid fit converges AND AIC values finite

pilot_tasks.name: Cross-arch pilot: JumpReLU SAE loading and alpha_ij validation
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: JumpReLU SAE loads successfully AND F1 computable AND F1 degradation < 30 pp
pilot_tasks.fallback: If JumpReLU not available via SAELens, use second L0 setting of standard 16k SAE at layer 12

pilot_tasks.name: Width paradox pilot: DAS(k=1) and DAS(k=3) at 16k and 65k
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: DAS(k=1) and DAS(k=3) computable for all 5 letters at both widths AND DAS(k=3) >= DAS(k=1) for at least 3 letters at 65k

pilot_tasks.name: PMI extraction pilot: 100k tokens, letters A-E
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: PMI values for >= 5 child tokens per letter AND PMI range [-3, 5] AND no NaN/inf

pilot_tasks.name: Absorption survey pilot: 3 SAE configs, 5 letters
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: absorption rates for all 5 letters x 3 configs AND std > 0.02 across configs AND at least 2 configs show absorption > 0.10 for at least 1 letter

pilot_tasks.name: SAEBench download and Pearson r pilot
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: SAEBench CSV downloads AND absorption_score column present AND Pearson r with RAVEL is finite AND computed on >= 10 SAEs

pilot_tasks.name: Matched RAVEL pilot: 4 SAEs, 50 prompts each
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: RAVEL runs without error AND produces scores for all 4 SAEs AND scores differ by > 0.01

pilot_tasks.name: Safety probe pilot: 1 SAE, 40 prompts, dense probe only
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Logistic regression trains without error AND ROC-AUC > 0.50 AND no NaN in CV scores

sequential_pilot_execution.description: Pilots that should be run together in a single 15-minute gate session
sequential_pilot_execution.notes: Run pilot_P0 first. If it passes, proceed to secondary pilots (CPU-only, can run in parallel). Full experiments start after all secondary pilots pass.
